# SIPA OS

> Cognitive scaffolding for neurodivergent minds (ADHD/BPD). Your external brain, built for how you actually think. Built by Aelin AquaSoul / Soul In PsyAbstract — a calm, modular system that replaces broken executive function with quiet, supportive infrastructure.

SIPA OS is an app for neurodivergent people. The product centers on four cognitive modules: Structure Engine, Emotional Radar, ADHD Focus, and BPD Crisis Protocol. No sensory overload, no FOMO, no aggressive monetization.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Tagline, modules, founder story, community voices.
- [About](/about): Founder & team. Who SIPA is for.
- [Story](/story): Origin story, message from Marina, timeline.
- [Manifest](/manifest): Protocol 0 principles.
- [Community](/community): Neurodivergent voices and shared posts.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about SIPA and neurodivergent design.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Authenticated module dashboard.
- [Sign In](/signin): Account sign-in / sign-up.
